snippet.title: Friends: The Reunion | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
Our favorite friends are back on the set that started it all. Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, Matt LeBlanc, Matthew Perry, David Schwimmer, and special guests reunite to discuss everything from their casting process to whether or not Ross and Rachel were really on a break. Witness the unbreakable bond of the group that perfectly captured the moment in life when your friends become your family.

Stream Friends: The Reunion May 27 on HBO Max.

snippet.title: NEW! Ep 3169 - Jethalal Takes Bapuji on a Trip! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta

localized.title: NEW! Ep 3169 - Jethalal Takes Bapuji on a Trip! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता
localized.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer

Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide

Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)

snippet.title: Swaragini | स्वरागिनी | Episode 233
snippet.description:
Sanskaar and Swara confesses their love to each other. Kavita reveals the true intentions of Ragini while she tries to manipulate her.

#ColorsRishtey #Swaragini

To subscribe this channel go to: https://www.youtube.com/c/ColorsRishtey1/featured

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the show playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLX18mvVSh-bwL5H8eIQ6w51VWKyjzA0oU

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/colorsrishteyindia
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rishteytv/

'Swaragini' is a story about Swara and Ragini, who belong to warring families, but later realise that they are in fact half-sisters. Out of sheer hatred, Ragini manipulates Swara's love interest, Lakshaya into marriage, while Swara ends up getting married to Lakshya's brother, Sanskar. Once he learns the truth, Sanskar swears to reunite Swara with Lakshya, but in turn falls in love with her. Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?

snippet.title: Mumbai: Cyclone Tauktae turns 'extremely severe', IMD issues orange alert
snippet.description: Gusty winds and rains lashed Mumbai and its neighbouring areas overnight and on Monday as the cyclone Tauktae turned into a very severe cyclonic storm. In view of the cyclone alert, the operations at the city's Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport were suspended from 11am till 2pm. Over 150 incidents of tree collapse were reported in Mumbai and suburban areas. As a precautionary measure, the Bandra-Worli Sea link has also been shut. India Meteorological Department has issued an orange alert for Mumbai, warning of very heavy rains at isolated places with strong winds on Monday as a cyclone is likely to pass close to the Mumbai coast. PM Narendra Modi has also spoken to Maharashtra CM Uddhav Thackeray regarding the current situation.

snippet.title: सनी देओल और जीतेन्द्र की एक्शन मूवी | Majboor | Movie In Part 04
snippet.description:
Retired judge Deenanath lives a happy life with his wife and two sons, lawyer Ravi and inspector Sunil. One day Ravi brings home a poor girl Sharda, rendered homeless after her father's demise. The family likes Sharda and subsequently arranges her marriage with Ravi. But a prisoner named Jankidas arrives on their wedding day claiming to be Sharda's husband. Plot thickens when in a conflict, Ravi gets implicated for the death of his henchman and his brother Sunil arrests him. Watch the movie to find out how their issues resolve.

YOR - 1990
Star Cast - Jeetendra, Jaya Prada, Sunny Deol, Ashok Kumar,  Farha Naaz, Mahesh Anand, Asrani,  Prem Chopra,  Seema Deo, Shakti Kapoor, Kader Khan, Johnny Lever
Director - Rama Rao Tatineni 
Producer - R. Joshi
Cinematographer - V. Durgaprasad
Music Director - Laxmikant Pyarelal
Lyricist - Anand Bakshi 
Screenplay - Iqbal Durrani
Dialogues - Iqbal Durrani
Editor - J. Krishnaswamy (Balu)

Star Cast - Jeetendra, Jaya Prada, Sunny Deol, Ashok Kumar,  Farha Naaz, Mahesh Anand, Asrani,  Prem Chopra,  Seema Deo, Shakti Kapoor, Kader Khan, Johnny Lever
Director - Rama Rao Tatineni

Lyricist - Anand Bakshi 
Screenplay - Iqbal Durrani
Dialogues - Iqbal Durrani
Editor - J. Krishnaswamy (Balu)

snippet.title: Samantha: "I'm truly HONORED to be part of The Family Man 2, It's a DREAM ROLE"| Manoj B
snippet.description:
#ManojBajpayee, #SamanthaRuthPrabhu, Priyamani, Aparna Purohit, Raj & DK in an exclusive interview with Bollywood Hungama's Faridoon Shahryar talk about the much awaited #TheFamilyMan2. They talk about the interesting scenes and some dialogues. Samantha says that she's honored to be part of this show and that it's a dream role. Manoj Bajpayee talks about how season 2 is different from season 1. Don't miss!


2:15 That surprise element this time is bringing in Samantha's character - Raj.

4:01 I'm truly honoured to be a part of this team and in a dream role - Samantha. 

5:29 Priyamani on 'Sham' scene in #TheFamilyManSeason2.

6:56 Manoj on the best thing about #TheFamilyManSeason2.

7:16 There was no major impact of season 1 on season 2 - Manoj.

11:49 Privacy is a myth just like WhatsApp - Raj.

snippet.title: बदला लेने के लिए की गयी शादी | Bhabhi Movie Scene | Govinda | Bhanupriya
snippet.description:
Sita's (Bhanupriya) father arranges her marriage with Prakash (Anand Balraj), the son of his former pupil. Prakash takes one look at her photograph and realises that Sita is the same girl who had slapped him for molesting her. He agrees to the wedding to exact revenge on her. Sita, meanwhile, blindly marries the guy chosen by her father and only realises the truth on the wedding night. It is then that her in-laws begin to torment her every chance they get. But Sita's brother-in-law, Amar (Govinda) cannot see her plight and rescues her before the family burns her alive. Amar and Sita then devise a plan to teach them all a lesson.

YOR - 1991
Star Cast - Govinda, Bhanupriya, Juhi Chawla 
Director -  Kishore Vyas
Producer - Jawaharlal B. Bafana
Cinematographer - U.S. Srivastava
Music Director -  Anu Malik
Story - Kishor Vyas
Lyricist - Hasrat Jaipuri,  Nawab Arzoo, Dev Kohli
Editor - Prakash Dave

Subscribe to Shemaroo - http://bit.ly/2DNFnzF

Join Shemaroo Channel Membership to watch exclusive latest films - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCF1JIbMUs6uqoZEY1Haw0GQ/join

snippet.description:
Article 51A(h) in The Constitution Of India 
It shall be the duty of every citizen of India to develop the scientific temper, humanism and the spirit of inquiry and reform.

അത്ഭുത സിദ്ധി, അമാനുഷികത എന്ന പേരിൽ സോഷ്യൽ മീഡിയ വഴി പ്രചരിക്കുന്ന  വീഡിയോകളുടെ രഹസ്യം, റീ ക്രിയേറ്റ് ചെയ്തു കാണിക്കാനോ, മറ്റേതെങ്കിലും വീഡിയോ, ഫയലുകൾ, ഉപയോഗിച്ച് അതിൻറെ രഹസ്യം തെളിയിക്കാനോ സാധിക്കുന്നത് മാത്രമേ  എപ്പിസോഡുകളിൽ ഉൾപ്പെടുത്തുകയുള്ളൂ

പുതിയ വിഡിയോ പെട്ടെന്ന് നിങ്ങളിലേക്കെത്താൻ വിഡിയോക്ക് താഴെയുള്ള SUBSCRIBE ബട്ടൻ ക്ലിക്ക് ചെയ്ത ശേഷം ബെൽ ബട്ടൺ 🔔  ക്ലിക്ക് ചെയ്യുക

snippet.title: Singles During Lockdown Ft. Anushka Sharma, Rishabh Puri | Hasley India Originals!
snippet.description:
Get the app here - http://bit.ly/Hasley_India
Use  ANDAT9  promo code for +100% on the first deposit.

Lo aagai nai video, haan 'Not Dating' ka naya season nai hai par pyaar bane rakho vo bhi aajaega. Comment section mein already kafi embarrass ho chuke hain hum. Par abhi to lockdown hai na. To ghar mein rehlo? Or hum bhi rehlete hain or tab tak ghar se hi mast videos apke lie bana dete hain. Mehnat to dekho utni hi lagti hai par quality mein thoda to compromise hoga hi. Or bhai agar tum bhi single ho to ye video tumhare lie hi hai. Ab iske neeche thoda formal description bhi dedeta hu nahi to kahoge kitni bakwas kar raha hai. 

Lockdown 2.0 aane ke baad while couples got into live in par singles hogae the behaal or is boriyat se nikalne ke lie bune inhone kai jaal. 

To agar aap janna chahte hain ki what happened to all the sakht launde and single didi out there? 

 Watch out 'Singles in Lockdown' now.

Acha chalo dekh ke comment or like kardena or agar abhi tak subscribe nahi kia hai to vo bhi kardo jaldi se, subscribe karne wale ko agle 5 din mein khush khabri milegi.

CAST
Anushka Sharma
Rishab Puri
Mahima Seth
Kartik Thakkar 

WRITTEN AND DIRECTED BY
Shubham Bajpai

AD
Albert Ritesh

DOP
Sabne Khud Karlia

POST PRODUCTION
Rohit Chadha

Don't forget to subscribe to our channel if you're new here.
HIT SUBSCRIBE!

snippet.title: Backyard Squirrel Maze 2.0- The Walnut Heist
snippet.description:
I bit off more than I could chew.  Join me this summer in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

NEW Phat Gus Merch here!! https://markrober.store/

More info about my Creative Engineering Course- 

This class is a hands-on, 30-day learning experience that will teach you how to use engineering and science to bring your creative ideas to life.

During this class, I'm going to share with you my entire creative engineering process from start to finish. You're going to follow along with me as I fully design and engineer 3 brand new builds from scratch... from how I come up with the idea, all the way through bringing the final builds to life.

The best part is, over the month, you'll follow along with me and my process, side by side, and you will leave the class with 3 original, creative builds of your own.

This is the class I wish I had when I was starting out. It's designed to take your skills to make cool stuff to the next level, whether you're a beginner or a more experienced maker/engineer.

The class officially starts on June 7th so claim your spot if you're interested!

See you in class!

-Mark

snippet.title: Google I/O 2021 keynote in 16 minutes
snippet.description:
Google just finished its 2-hour long I/O 2021 keynote and we did our best to summarize it for you. It announced updates coming to Android 12, Workspace, Google Photos, privacy, and more. Plus, Google’s LaMDA AI language demo shows what it’s like to have a chat with Pluto.

0:01 Intro 
0:09 LaMDA (Pluto) 
3:11 Google Maps 
5:38 Google Shopping
5:58 Google Photos
8:07 Material You
9:12 Android 12
10:33 Privacy
11:48 Better Together
12:57 Smartwatch & Wear OS 
13:38 Racial bias in computational photography
14:24 Project Starline

Read more: https://bit.ly/3yjsCJT

Subscribe: http://goo.gl/G5RXGs
Like The Verge on Facebook: https://goo.gl/2P1aGc
Follow on Twitter: https://goo.gl/XTWX61
Follow on Instagram: https://goo.gl/7ZeLvX

The Vergecast Podcast: https://pod.link/430333725
Decoder with Nilay Patel: http://apple.co/3v29nDc 
More about our podcasts: https://www.theverge.com/podcasts

Read More: http://www.theverge.com
Community guidelines: http://bit.ly/2D0hlAv
Wallpapers from The Verge: https://bit.ly/2xQXYJr

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Episode 3168: Bhide Wants The Achar Papad Order
---------------------------------------------------------
Bhide Calls Popatlal  and asks him how is he doing. To which Popatlal replies he is in the middle of something and if not urgent he will speak with Bhide when he is able to. To which Bhide replies that he wants favor from Popatlal and Popatlal can help him by arranging a meeting with the resort manger so Bhide could get the order of Achar and Pappad to know more watch the full episode.


More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.description:
#MasalaPaniyaramRecipe
#EasyKuzhiPaniyaram
#EasyBreakfast
#EasyEveningSnacks

Ingredients 
`````````````````
raw rice/white rice - 1 cup
urad dal -1/4 cup
Fenugreek seeds -1/4 tsp
water
oil -2 tbsp
garlic -1 tbsp
ginger -1 tsp
curry leaves -1-2 tsp
Onion -1
chilli powder -1 tsp
hing powder -1/4 tsp
Coriander leaves -2 tbsp
oil -2 -3 tbsp
`````````````````

snippet.title: VR LIVE വിശ്വാസിയുടെ ദിനരാത്രങ്ങള്‍ ഭാഗം :03
snippet.description:
#Voice_of_Rahmaniyya   #Malayalam_Islamic_Speech #islamicspeechmalayalamnew #islamicspeeches #islamicspeechmalayalam #islamicspeechinmalayalam #islamicspeechmalayalamnew2020 #islamicspeechlive  #islamicspeechtv #islamicspeech2020 #islamicspeechandquran #islamicspeechesinmalayalam #islamicspeechmalayalam2020 #islamicspeechmalayalam2019 #islamicspeech2019
കേരളീയ വൈജ്ഞാനിക പ്രയാണ ചരിത്രത്തിൽ സമന്വയ വിദ്യഭ്യാസമെന്ന നൂതനവും കാലികവുമായ ആശയത്തിന് ബീജാവാഹം പകർന്ന് കൊടുത്ത സ്ഥാപനമാണ് കടമേരി റഹ്മാനിയ്യ. പിൽകാലത്ത് കേരള മണ്ണിൽ ഉയിർ കൊണ്ട് വിജ്ഞാന കേന്ദ്രങ്ങളെല്ലാം ആ ആശയത്തിന് ഊടും പാവും നൽകി വെെവിധ്യങ്ങൾ നെയ്തെടുത്തതാണ്.ചീക്കിലോട്ട് കുഞ്ഞമ്മദ് മുസ്ലിയാരുടെ നിഷകളങ്ക പ്രയത്നത്തിൻ്റെ നിത്യസ്മാരകം കൂടിയാണ് റഹ്മാനിയ്യ എന്ന വെെജ്ഞാനിക കേദാരം. പതിറ്റാണ്ടുകൾ പിന്നിട്ട റഹ്മാനിയ്യ കെെരളിക്ക് അതുല്ല്യ നേട്ടങ്ങൾ സംഭവന ചെയ്തിട്ടുണ്ട്. പ്രത്യേകിച്ച് മത പ്രബോധന വീഥിയിൽ.എണ്ണമറ്റ റഹ്മാനികളായ പ്രഭാഷകന്മാർ അഹ്ലുസുന്നത്തി വൽജമാആത്തിൻ്റെ ആദർശഭടന്മാരായി നിലകൊള്ളുന്നു. അവരുടെ അർത്ഥഗർഭമായ പ്രഭാഷണങ്ങൾ സോഷ്യൽ മീഡിയയിലൂടെ ലോകത്തിന് മുമ്പിൽ എത്തിക്കുകയെന്ന എളിയ ശ്രമമാണ് വോയിസ് ഓഫ് റഹ്മാനിയ്യ. പഠനാർഹമായ പുതിയ വിഷയങ്ങൾ ക്ലിപ്പുകളാക്കി ദെെനം ദിനം ജനങ്ങളിലെത്തിക്കാനും പ്രഭാഷണങ്ങൾ ലെെവ് ചെയ്ത് തൽസമയം പ്രേഷകരിലെത്തിക്കാനും ഇതിൻ്റെ അണിയറ പ്രവർത്തകർ ബദ്ധശ്രദ്ധരാണ്



https://chat.whatsapp.com/4ZCyiAXzKZ5...

ഇതിൽ ക്ലിക്ക് ചെയ്താൽ വോയ്സ് ഓഫ് റഹ്മാനിയ്യ ഗ്രൂപ്പിൽ മെമ്പർ ആവാം താൽപര്യമുള്ളവർ ക്ലിക്ക് ചെയത് അഡ്മിൻസുമായി നിയമാവലി കൈപറ്റുക

snippet.description:
வடிவேலு போல் நடித்து அசத்திய சிறுமி😂 Chella Kutties | Epi 10 | Part 1 | Imman Annachi | Kalaignar TV

Stay tuned with us : http://bit.ly/subscribekalaignartv

To Participate in செல்லக் குட்டீஸ்...
Contact : 8754071686 , 8870117242 (WhatsApp Only)

"செல்லக் குட்டீஸ்"
ஞாயிறுதோறும் காலை 11 மணிக்கு

நமது கலைஞர் தொலைக்காட்சியில்..
காணத்தவறாதீர்கள்..

👉எலி ஜோசியம் பார்த்த குட்டீஸ்..! https://youtu.be/p4lNxNKnzkw

👉என் அம்மா சமைக்குற தயிர் சாதம் எனக்கு பிடிக்காது..! 
https://youtu.be/k92Gu5Gt7OI

👉தலைவர் பிறந்தநாள் சிறப்பு பட்டிமன்றம்.! M K Stalin B'day Special  - https://youtu.be/XbcchqwNrss​​

👉 சோகம் மட்டுமே சூழ்ந்துள்ள இந்த பெண்ணின் வாழ்க்கை.! தீர்வு என்ன.? Lakshmy Ramkarishnan 
https://youtu.be/5YTGV-DEsww​​

👉 பச்சிளம் குழந்தையை கொன்றது குரங்கா? மர்ம மனிதனா?
https://youtu.be/_wUyIMif8uQ​​

👉 Aelay Movie Special Interview | Samuthirakani | Manikandan 
https://youtu.be/4ZkNhnWlZb4​​

👉 தற்காப்புக்காக இளைஞரை கொன்ற பெண் விடுதலையில் பரபரப்பு திருப்பம்…!  https://youtu.be/BkQcz3hN6GA​​

👉 14 வயதில் சீரழிந்த வாழ்க்கை..! அதிர்ச்சி சம்பவத்தின் பின்னணி.! https://youtu.be/-jRh0iMkO54​​

👉 பாம்பை கடிக்க விட்டு மனைவியை கொலை செய்தேன்.! 
https://youtu.be/hc2OaV59D0s​​

snippet.title: The Hospital Catch | सीआईडी | Real Heroes
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Crime: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzXpAx4v6rFLYXkJZ5nmSvQ?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of real heroes: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL0y08jtgaKIVIYFOZ8qi-3qMLgI8sKQmY

A mystical Cylinder inside Hospital's basement become the only virtue of her Deadly encounter. She kept asking for help, but it turned out serious. Meanwhile, ACP hasn't been feeling well and is admitted inside the same hospital. When CID hears about the case, they dart orderly after the various leads. Who's streaming the lethal felony? Where does CID go with the situation? Watch now, to find out more.

About CID:
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues

snippet.title: 1/2 किलो चिकन मसाला मार्केट सारखी परफेक्ट रेसीपी। करा स्वतःचा बिझनेस, संपूर्ण माहिती
snippet.description:
1/2 किलो चिकन मसाला मार्केट सारखी परफेक्ट रेसीपी। करा स्वतःचा बिझनेस, संपूर्ण माहिती

Hotel food series 1( 1 chicken biryani) :-
https://youtu.be/XvGa6QNbxf8

Hotel food series (Anda    Masala) :-

https://youtu.be/uL0uaXzxLC4


Ingredients / साहित्य -
Serves 4

Marination / मॅरिनेशन 
Chicken / चिकन 1/2 किलो
Fresh curd / ताजे दही 125 gms 
Ginger garlic paste / आले लसुण पेस्ट 1 tsp
Corriender powder / धणे पावडर 1 tsp
Garam masala powder / गरम मसाला पावडर 1/2 tsp
Turmeric / हळद 1/2 tsp
Salt / मीठ 

Special masala / स्पेशल मसाला 

Almonds / बदाम 6
Corriender seeds / धणे 2 tsp
Cummin seeds / जीरे 1 tso
Black pepper / काळी मिरी 6-7
Fennel seeds / बडीशोप 1 tsp
Garam masala powder / गरम मसाला पावडर 1 tsp

Oil / तेल 
Bay leaves / तमालपत्र 3
Cinnamon / दालचिनी 1 inch
Green cardamom / हिरवी वेलची 4
Cloves / लवंग 4-5
Finely chopped garlic / बारीक चिरलेला लसूण 1 tbsp
Finely chopped onions / बारीक चिरलेला कांदा 3 med (200gms)
Tomato puree / टोमॅटो प्युरी 2 med tomatos (150gms) 
Kashmiri red chilly powder / कश्मीरी मिर्ची पाउडर 1 tsp
Salt / मीठ 
Water / पाणी 2cups (400ml)
Fresh corriender / कोथिंबीर 

#1किलोचिकनमसालामार्केटसारखीपरफेक्टरेसीपी
#ढाबाstyleचिकनमसाला
#चिकनमसाला
#masalachicken
#gavaranchickenrecipe
#अर्धाकिलोचिकनमसालामराठी
#chickenrecipeforfoodbusiness
#homemadechickenmasala
#1किलोचिकनदममसाला

snippet.title: Harano Sur - Full Episode | 17 May 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Harano Sur" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Harano Sur: Shashanka Shekhar, the music maestro, is spellbound by Ahana’s singing and wants to get her married to his son Nakshatra. He is inclined towards popular music over classical & is more renowned than his father. He is against marrying a singer. Coincidentally, he also meets Ahana & she appears to be someone who doesn’t care about his celebrity status or lavish lifestyle. He gets married to Ahana, without knowing about her singing abilities. What will happen when Nakshatra gets to know about Ahana’s singing abilities? Will music cause divide between them?

snippet.title: Nayantara - Full Episode | 17 May 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Nayantara" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Nayantara: After 10 years of marriage, Adidev (Gourab Mondal) and Averi (Payal De) are about to experience parenthood with the birth of their first child. The doctor warns Avery that she might face life threatening complications if she decides to go ahead with the child birth. Averi does not tell Adidev about this because she wants to give him the happiness of fatherhood and be a mother herself. On the other hand, Avery means the world to Adidev, so he will definitely chose her life over the child. Avery gives birth to Tara (Hiya Mukherjee). Avery dies within a few minutes of Tara’s birth. The doctor informs Adidev that he had warned Avery but she did not listen. Adidev, who was already devastated by his wife's death, comes to know that the Income Tax Department had raided his office. Adidev starts to believe that Tara is the source of the misfortune in his life and hatred grows in his heart for Tara. On the other hand, Adidev's second wife Madhuja (Swarnakamal) loves Tara more than her own daughter Preeti. But Adideb can’t tolerate that either. Tara's only wish, will she ever get his father's affection?

snippet.title: Maharashtra में साइक्‍लोन Tauktae ने मचाई तबाही, 6 लोगों की मौत, हजारों घर ढहे, सैकड़ों पेड़ उखड़े
snippet.description:
महाराष्ट्र में तूफान ताउते के चलते अब तक 6 लोगों की मौत हुई है और 9 लोग घायल हैं। 4 जानवरों की भी मौत हुई है। मुख्‍यमंत्री उद्धव ठाकरे ने तूफान के चलते हुए नुकसान कार्यों का जायजा लिया है। उन्‍होंने तुरंत राहत कार्य तेजी से करने का आदेश दिया है। इस दौरान करीब 13 हजार लोगों को सुरक्षित स्‍थानों पर पहुंचाया गया है। मुख्यमंत्री ने जिला प्रशासन से गिरे हुए पेड़ों, गिरे हुए बिजली के खंभों को तुरंत हटाने और गांवों की ओर जाने वाली सड़कों को भी सही करने को कहा, ताकि यातायात सुचारु हो सके।

localized.title: Maharashtra में साइक्‍लोन Tauktae ने मचाई तबाही, 6 लोगों की मौत, हजारों घर ढहे, सैकड़ों पेड़ उखड़े
localized.description:
महाराष्ट्र में तूफान ताउते के चलते अब तक 6 लोगों की मौत हुई है और 9 लोग घायल हैं। 4 जानवरों की भी मौत हुई है। मुख्‍यमंत्री उद्धव ठाकरे ने तूफान के चलते हुए नुकसान कार्यों का जायजा लिया है। उन्‍होंने तुरंत राहत कार्य तेजी से करने का आदेश दिया है। इस दौरान करीब 13 हजार लोगों को सुरक्षित स्‍थानों पर पहुंचाया गया है। मुख्यमंत्री ने जिला प्रशासन से गिरे हुए पेड़ों, गिरे हुए बिजली के खंभों को तुरंत हटाने और गांवों की ओर जाने वाली सड़कों को भी सही करने को कहा, ताकि यातायात सुचारु हो सके।

snippet.title: Padmaavat | Scene 7 | The Guest Demands | Deepika Padukone | Ranveer Singh | Shahid Kapoor
snippet.description:
Queen Padmavati is happily married to a Rajput ruler until a tyrant Sultan, Alauddin Khilji, enters their life and calls a war on their kingdom due to his obsession with the queen.

Padmaavat is a 2018 Indian Hindi-language epic period drama film directed by Sanjay Leela Bhansali. Based on the epic poem of the same name by Malik Muhammad Jayasi, it stars Deepika Padukone as Rani Padmavati, a Rajput queen known for her beauty, wife of Maharawal Ratan Singh, played by Shahid Kapoor. Sultan Alauddin Khilji, played by Ranveer Singh, hears of her beauty and attacks her kingdom to claim her. Aditi Rao Hydari, Jim Sarbh, Raza Murad, and Anupriya Goenka featured in supporting roles.

#Padmaavat #PadmaavatScenes #RanveerDeepika

snippet.title: സുബൈദ ഉമ്മയ്ക്കും സത്യപ്രതിജ്ഞാ ചടങ്ങിന് ക്ഷണം | Subaida Umma | Swearing In Ceremony |
snippet.description:
Subaida Umma | Swearing In Ceremony | ആടിനെ വിറ്റ് മുഖ്യമന്ത്രിയുടെ ദുരിതാശ്വാസ നിധിയിലേക്ക് പണം നല്‍കിയ സുബൈദ ഉമ്മയ്ക്കും സത്യപ്രതിജ്ഞാ ചടങ്ങിന് ക്ഷണം 


Malayalam News Malayalam Latest News Malayalam Latest News Videos

Log onto MediaOne news live TV for the latest  Malayalam news update, Kerala breaking news, gulf news, trending Malayalam news, Malayalam  entertainment, sports news.
MediaOne is a 24x7 news channel which broadcasts the updated news from trustworthy sources. The fastest-growing channel with varied presentations makes the channel unique. So stay tuned with MediaOne for the latest updates that are happening around the world.
MediaOne is an initiative by Madhyamam.

കേരളത്തിലെ ഏറ്റവും മികച്ച വാര്‍ത്താ നെറ്റ്‌വര്‍ക്കാണ് മീഡിയവണ്‍ . ഏറ്റവും കൂടുതല്‍ പേര്‍ തത്സമയം മലയാളം വാര്‍ത്തകള്‍ കാണുന്ന മലയാളത്തിലെ മുന്‍നിര വാര്‍ത്താ ചാനല്‍. മൂല്യാധിഷ്ഠിതവും സ്വതന്ത്രവുമായ മാധ്യമപ്രവർത്തനം നടത്തുന്ന മലയാള ന്യൂസ് ടെലിവിഷൻ ചാനലാണിത്‌. ലോകമെമ്പാടുമുള്ള ഉറവിടങ്ങളിൽ നിന്ന്സമാഹരിച്ച കാലികവും സമഗ്രവുമായ  വാർത്തകളും പ്രോഗ്രാമുകളും വ്യത്യസ്തമായ രീതിയിൽ മീഡിയവൺ പ്രേക്ഷകരിലെത്തിക്കുന്നു. 

 24 മണിക്കൂറും ലോകത്തിന്‍റെ ഏത് ഭാഗത്ത് നിന്നും ഇവിടെ തത്സമയം #ലൈവ് കാണാം. അതിവേഗം വാര്‍ത്താ വീഡിയോകള്‍ ലഭിക്കാൻ മീഡിയവണ്‍ സബ്സ്ക്രൈബ് ചെയ്യൂ... ബെല്‍ ബട്ടണും ക്ലിക്ക് ചെയ്യൂ.

ഏറ്റവും പുതിയ  വാർത്തകൾക്കായി സന്ദർശിക്കുക: https://youtu.be/d1iwUB9YFnA
Watch the latest malayalam updates, Kerala news live and news around the world  with MediaOne News live TV
For more visit us: https://bit.ly/3iU2qNW

 24 മണിക്കൂറും ലോകത്തിന്‍റെ ഏത് ഭാഗത്ത് നിന്നും ഇവിടെ തത്സമയം #ലൈവ് കാണാം. അതിവേഗം വാര്‍ത്താ വീഡിയോകള്‍ ലഭിക്കാൻ മീഡിയവണ്‍ സബ്സ്ക്രൈബ് ചെയ്യൂ... ബെല്‍ ബട്ടണും ക്ലിക്ക് ചെയ്യൂ.

ഏറ്റവും പുതിയ  വാർത്തകൾക്കായി സന്ദർശിക്കുക: https://youtu.be/d1iwUB9YFnA

snippet.description:

Watch latest entertainment updates of the day in Saas Bahu Aur Saazish. snippet.title: Tauktae Cyclone Update: इन 6 तस्वीरों से समझिए Tauktae तूफान की ताकत | Tauktae In Rajasthan
snippet.description:
Tauktae Cyclone Update: इन 6 तस्वीरों से समझिए Tauktae तूफान की ताकत | Tauktae In Rajasthan 

प्रदेश में Tauktae तूफान का असर और कहां-कहां किस-किस जिले में कितना पड़ा है, 6 जगहों की तस्वीर और आपको दिखाते हैं, Jaipur के कोटपूतली में समेत ग्रामीण क्षेत्र में तूफान का असर दिख रहा है, लगातार बारिश से निचले हिस्सों में पानी भर गया है, Bhilwara के गंगापुर में सुबह 2 इंच बरसात दर्ज की गई, बरसात के कारण सड़के जलमग्न हो गई है, गांव के कई में मार्गों में पानी भरा हुआ है ।

#RajasthanTaukae #TauktaeCyclone #LatestRajasthanNews

Zee Rajasthan News believes that villages make the State। The channel will cover content from various villages/Tehsil/District beyond the Rajasthan  capital or cities। ZEE Rajasthan News will flash more than 1500 news throughout the day।

hi.title: Tauktae Cyclone Update: इन 6 तस्वीरों से समझिए Tauktae तूफान की ताकत | Tauktae In Rajasthan
hi.description:
Tauktae Cyclone Update: इन 6 तस्वीरों से समझिए Tauktae तूफान की ताकत | Tauktae In Rajasthan 

प्रदेश में Tauktae तूफान का असर और कहां-कहां किस-किस जिले में कितना पड़ा है, 6 जगहों की तस्वीर और आपको दिखाते हैं, Jaipur के कोटपूतली में समेत ग्रामीण क्षेत्र में तूफान का असर दिख रहा है, लगातार बारिश से निचले हिस्सों में पानी भर गया है, Bhilwara के गंगापुर में सुबह 2 इंच बरसात दर्ज की गई, बरसात के कारण सड़के जलमग्न हो गई है, गांव के कई में मार्गों में पानी भरा हुआ है ।

snippet.title: क्यों भाग रहा हैJethalal इतनी Speed से? | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा | Most Viewed
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: 
https://www.youtube.com/user/sonypalindia?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch Most Viewed clips:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLfyXOEyr93G2qps16ADXNqjds8djQzTsK

Bhide's Scooter is on the list where it's getting difficult for Gokuldham members to track it. Meanwhile, Sodhi, Tappu Sena, Jethalal make a team and divide themselves among particular areas to find the mystery behind Scooter. What is the Mystery? Where is Jethalal running to? Watch the full episode to find out.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

Episode 2424: Tappu Solves The Problem
------------------------------------
  Iyer tries every solution but it fails to remove the color from his face. Just when Iyer gives up, Tappu arrives and assures them that he has a solution. The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: Swaragini | स्वरागिनी | Episode 232
snippet.description:
Truth about Sanskaar and Swara's relationship is revealed to Kavita. Kavita tries to unite Sanskaar and Swara together. Urvashi tries to provoke Maheshwari's against Swara.

#ColorsRishtey #Swaragini

To subscribe this channel go to: https://www.youtube.com/c/ColorsRishtey1/featured

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the show playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLX18mvVSh-bwL5H8eIQ6w51VWKyjzA0oU

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/colorsrishteyindia
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rishteytv/

'Swaragini' is a story about Swara and Ragini, who belong to warring families, but later realise that they are in fact half-sisters. Out of sheer hatred, Ragini manipulates Swara's love interest, Lakshaya into marriage, while Swara ends up getting married to Lakshya's brother, Sanskar. Once he learns the truth, Sanskar swears to reunite Swara with Lakshya, but in turn falls in love with her. Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?

Servings : 3 Servings

Ingredients:
4 medium potatoes
1 tbs ginger chili paste
3-4 tbs coriander leaves
3 tbs Besan
4-5 tbs rice flour
salt to taste
1\2 lemon juice
1\2 tsp sugar
2 tomatoes
1 small onion
1 green chili
coriander leaves
salt to taste
1\4 tsp pepper powder
2-3 tbs tomato ketchup

ജനിച്ചു വളർന്ന സ്വന്തം നാട്ടിൽ അഭയാർഥികളെപ്പോലെ ജീവിക്കേണ്ടി വരുന്നതിനെക്കുറിച്ച് ആലോചിച്ചിട്ടുണ്ടോ ❓

📜📜 അത്തരം ഒരു നാടിന്റെ ചരിത്രവും, വേദനിപ്പിക്കുന്ന ചില യാഥാർത്ഥ്യങ്ങളും ചർച്ച ചെയ്യപ്പെടുന്നു..

"ഫലസ്തീൻ : അകവും ആകാശവും" 

🗓️ ഇന്ന് 
🔖 18.05.2021 ചൊവ്വ 
⏰ രാത്രി 07.30 PM IST

പങ്കെടുക്കുന്നവർ :

🎤 ET Muhammad Basheer MP 
🎤 PN അബ്ദുറഹ്മാൻ അബ്ദുലത്തീഫ് 
🎤 ഡോ. അർശദ് ഖുറൈശി 
🎤 അർശദ് അൽ ഹികമി 
🎤 മുഹമ്മദ് അജ്മൽ C


For more updates, Join:
https://chat.whatsapp.com/BradIxyYaeGAxEHrryWZsx


0:00 സ്വാഗതം
2:41  ആമുഖ പ്രഭാഷണം C. P സലിം
08:30- E. T മുഹമ്മദ്‌ ബഷീർ MP
20:31- M.A ബേബി സർ - പലസ്തീൻ ചരിത്ര വസ്തുതകൾ  
53:23- വസ്തുതാ വിരുദ്ധ ആരോപണം സഹതാപാർഹം -  C. P സലിം
56:52- ഫലസ്തീൻ കവി എഴുതിയ കവിതാലാപനം
59:42- ഫലസ്തീൻ ചരിത്രവും വർത്തമാനവും - PN അബ്ദുറഹ്മാൻ
1:39:39 - ഇസ്രായേൽ നരനായാട്ടിന് ദൃക്സാക്ഷിയായ Dr അർശദ് ഖുറൈശിയുടെ വിവരണം
2:02:03 - ഹൃദയസ്പർശിയായ സമാപന ഭാഷണം - മുജീബ് ഒട്ടുമ്മൽ

snippet.description:

snippet.title: SR : NH54 4 Lane Compensation | 17.5.2021
snippet.description:
NH54/306 Four Lane laih tur, Khamrang to Kawnpui compensation leh a behbawm. Khamrang rama Ghost Town an tih thin hi enge a nihna chiah? 

Kawngpui kama dragon fruit hmun siam thar tam ta em em hi engvange nge?..a hmunah kan bihchiang. 

Kum 1981 atanga din tan Kawnpui Kanan Veng, in 40 awmna chu kawngpui sial vang hian a bo dawn. An inhmun te lah VC pass mai a ni hlawm si, VC pass in land value a nei si lo! Engtin nge ni zel ang le? 

Kan report hi lo thlir ve ngei ang che.

**Official Special Report YouTube Channel**
**Like, Leave a Comment, Share & SUBSCRIBE**
